creator: chuck@tuffli.net
text: It would be interesting to see what, if any, failure occurs without adding a specific quirk for your device. So if you have the time and inclination, I'd vote for experiment #1 to be the D13389 patch without changes and experiment #2 to be the D13389 patch plus an entry in pci_ids for your device with .quirks set to QUIRK_DELAY_B4_CHK_RDY.
